channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Can Gen Z Protests Reshape Governance in Africa?
item.description: Across Africa, Gen Z–led protests are redefining political engagement. But can this new wave of activism move beyond disruption to deliver lasting institutional change?

item.title: Unpacking the $1.5 Trillion FY 2027 Defense Budget Topline
item.description: On April 3, the White House released details of its defense budget request for FY 2027. Seamus Daniels unpacks the $1.5 trillion topline requested for national defense and its implications for congressional action.

item.title: Reining in the Export Control Arms Race
item.description: Export controls are evolving from a national security policy tool to an instrument of economic coercion. When Trump and Xi meet next in May, reigning in the arms race should be at the top of the agenda.
